source.note: official chat template serialization; no pinned model emits this format

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a city.

text:
I'll check the weather in both cities.

<tool_call>
<function=get_weather>
<parameter=city>
Paris
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
<function=get_weather>
<parameter=city>
Tokyo
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

expected.content: I'll check the weather in both cities.
